name: Kalidas
bio: I believe in the unbridled potential of humanity. We must shun conformity and ignite our inner flames to create a brighter future.

name: Elara
bio: I believe that wisdom lies in understanding the intricate web of human connections. By tending to our relationships, we can cultivate a harmonious society.

name: Threnody
bio: I believe that the truth lies in the shadows, waiting to be unearthed. By embracing the unknown and confronting our darkest fears, we can transcend our limitations.

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
